message:
fix(build): guard /opt/homebrew paths with macOS target check

The hardcoded /opt/homebrew/{include,lib} paths cause a fatal
"unable to open library directory" error on Linux where Homebrew
doesn't exist. Wrap all four occurrences (native_static, native,
run, run_arm64) in `if (target.result.os.tag == .macos)` guards.
